new_text: Structural audit ~/Desktop/torus-github/ (2026-02-26): All settings.json hook scripts present; no production code missing. Verified: tracker.py, all gate files (01-19), shared modules, skills (PRPs, loop, wave exist). Top-level README.md is main gap. HANDOFF.md, LIVE_STATE.json correctly gitignored. hooks/shared/ and hooks/gates/ empty __init__.py acceptable (namespace packages). fuzz_gates.py orphaned utility file. Conclusion: repo structurally sound, GitHub visibility needs root README only.

Gate 10 (Model Cost Guard) final design: Two-step enforcement. Step 1 (BLOCKING): Task calls without explicit model parameter blocked—prevents silent inheritance of expensive parent model. Step 2 (ADVISORY): Warns when model doesn't match agent type recommendations (Explore/Plan→haiku/sonnet, general→sonnet/opus, Bash→haiku/sonnet). RECOMMENDED_MODELS dict + MODEL_SUGGESTIONS dict map subagent_type to recommendations. File: ~/.claude/hooks/gates/gate_10_model_enforcement.py. 15 tests passing (7 original + 8 new).

Session 13 (2026-02-10): Closed audit gaps M4/G1-2, M5/G3-2, M6/G7-3 + verified MCP causal tracking. Task 1: Confirmed record_attempt, record_outcome, query_fix_history working; server (PID 2047880) already running. Task 2: Gate pattern expansions. Gate 1 (guarded extensions): +.c/.cpp/.rb/.php/.sh/.sql/.tf (15 total). Gate 3 (deploy patterns): +helm/terraform/pulumi/serverless/cdk (22 total). Gate 7 (critical patterns): +.ssh/.authorized_keys/id_rsa/.pem/.key/sudoers/crontab (22 total). Tests: 32 new (8+13+10+1), 207/207 passing.

Session 15 Security Audit (2026-02-10): Analyzed 17 .py + 1 .sh in hooks/. No new CRITICAL findings. 4 HIGH (residuals), 3 MEDIUM (M1: gate_09 missing NotebookEdit), 4 LOW, 3 INFO. Residual issues: Gate 9 NotebookEdit gap, memory_stats() always reports "healthy", Gate 3 exit code sourced from tool_input not tool_response. No hardcoded secrets, os.system(), eval(), exec(), subprocess shell=True, pickle, yaml.load in production. subprocess.run only in tests (safe—no shell=True).

Session 344 outcomes: (1) Forked trading-framework→trading-claude (~/projects/)—Claude-native trading framework, no API calls, 7 CLI scripts, /trade+/market skills, 174 tests pass. (2) Visibility strategy: open-source done; post showcases on Claude Code GitHub + X/Twitter. (3) CRITICAL FIX: Rule 5 gap—gates only fire on PreToolUse, plain text claims bypass gates. Fixed via UserPromptSubmit hook (user_prompt_capture.py) injecting Rule 5 reminder to context every prompt. (4) Architecture: UserPromptSubmit warns (stdout), doesn't block (exit 2); gates on PreToolUse. Future: add state-based warnings (unsaved fixes, unqueried memory, open chains) to UserPromptSubmit.

Session 345 key work: (1) HANDOFF.md resurrection root cause—CLAUDE.md line 25 never updated during 156-157 refactor; removed all 19 refs (commit 9df9655). (2) Synced github-branch with framework upgrades (commit 58acf87, v2.5.9). (3) Implemented Rule 8 "Ask before acting" in CLAUDE.md + UserPromptSubmit hook after unauthorized push incident (commit d79f684). (4) Analytics MCP online (added to mcp.json). (5) Gate 14 stuck-state bug: tracker adds ALL files pending_verification without exemption check (orchestrator.py:252-258) + test_framework.py not in BROAD_TEST_COMMANDS—NOT YET FIXED. (6) Restarted voice-web (SSL certs regenerated).

UserPromptSubmit hook created + registered (2026-02-10): New file ~/.claude/hooks/user_prompt_check.sh (25 lines): reads JSON stdin, extracts prompt, detects correction patterns (^no, |wrong, |actually, |that's not right/incorrect, |try again) and feature requests (can you, i wish, is there a way, would it be possible). Outputs <correction_detected> or <feature_request_detected> XML tags; normal prompts silent. Target <200ms. Modified settings.json (lines 46-56): added UserPromptSubmit hook entry, command: bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/user_prompt_check.sh", timeout 3000ms. All 3 test cases pass.

Session 168: 4 next_steps completed. (1) Gate input guards: Added `if not isinstance(tool_input, dict): tool_input = {}` to 9 gates (01-07, 10, 14, 16)—handles None/non-dict without crash. (2) Gate 11 optimization: Removed redundant save_state()—enforcer already saves after gates. 3.64ms→0.005ms (728x faster). (3) auto_format.py wired into PostToolUse (Edit|Write, timeout 3). (4) Research patterns: stop_cleanup.py (clears pending_verification + workspace_lock on Stop), failure_recovery.py (PostToolUseFailure hints), integrity_check.py (SHA256 baseline for 6 critical files). All wired into settings.json. Tests: 1530 passed.

Session 203: LIVE_STATE.json cleanup. (1) Extracted 19 toggles + session_metrics into ~/.claude/config.json—persist across resets. get_live_toggle() reads config.json first. (2) Removed 5 stale fields: status, service_status, feature_status, test_count/failures, project_path. LIVE_STATE: 22→7 fields. Session start injection reduced ~200 tokens. (3) Files changed: config.json (new), LIVE_STATE.json, shared/state.py, memory_server.py, tg_mirror.py, statusline.py, session_end.py, orchestrator.py, subagent_context.py, config_validator.py, test_framework.py, 4 skill SKILL.md. Result: 1449 tests pass.

Task 4 + hook wiring sprint complete: Created ~/.claude/hooks/integrity_check.py—SessionStart hook monitoring SHA256 hashes of enforcer.py, tracker.py, boot.py, shared/gate_router/state/gate_result.py. Bootstrap mode writes .integrity_hashes.json on first run; subsequent warn on mismatch. Supports --update flag. Fail-open (exit 0). Wired to settings.json SessionStart (timeout 5). All 4 tasks verified: settings.json valid, 3 .py files syntactically valid. PostToolUse: tracker, auto_commit (Edit|Write), auto_format (Edit|Write). Stop: tg_mirror, stop_cleanup. PostToolUseFailure: event_logger, failure_recovery. SessionStart: boot, integrity_check.

CLAUDE.md v2.4.2→v2.4.3: 1,666→1,321 tokens (-345, -20.7%). Changes: (1) Renamed "Self-Healing Claude Framework"→"Torus-Framework". (2) Deleted 3 rules redundant w/ tool descriptions (Smart agent delegation, Read before edit enforced by Gate 1, No destructive enforced by Gate 2). (3) Removed agent delegation workflow (5 lines) duplicated by TeamCreate. (4) Deleted intro line. (5) Compressed Session Start steps 3+4 to single lines. (6) Compressed Memory Tag Conventions to 1 line. (7) Compressed Causal Chain—removed verbose descriptions. (8) Added Gates 10/11/12. Net: More gates enforced, fewer tokens; ~17,250 tokens saved per 50-call session.

Session 49: Implemented torus-loop orchestrator Phase 2+3. DELIVERED: (1) ~/.claude/PRPs/templates/tasks.json (machine-readable template). (2) ~/.claude/PRPs/task_manager.py (CLI status/next/update/validate, 165 lines). (3) ~/.claude/scripts/torus-loop.sh (orchestrator spawning fresh Claude per task, 187 lines). (4) ~/.claude/scripts/megaman-prompt.md (per-iteration template). (5) ~/.claude/skills/loop/SKILL.md (/loop start|status|stop). (6) Modified base.md + prp SKILL.md. (7) +80 test lines. BUGS FIXED: CLAUDECODE blocks nested instances→env -u CLAUDECODE; task_manager.py validate wrong cwd→derive from files[0] dirname; gate.__name__ dup dashboard entries→use GATE_NAME. Integration test: 2-task PRP both passed, memory bridge confirmed. Tests: 1036 passed. Memory: 321 entries.

Enhanced capability_registry.py w/ agent ACL support (Session 165). AGENT_ACLS dict—11 entries: explorer/researcher (read-only), builder/optimizer (full), bash (Bash+read), auditor (read+memory), code-reviewer (read+memory), team-lead (full minus Edit/Write), test-writer (test files only), stress-tester (Bash+read). _ACL_OVERRIDES dict—runtime registry. _DESTRUCTIVE_BASH_PATTERNS—guards rm -rf, DROP TABLE, mkfs, fork bomb, dd, /dev/. define_agent_acl(agent_type, *, allowed_tools, denied_tools, allowed_paths) merges overrides. check_agent_permission()→bool; eval: deny>allow>default>path. All 11 assertions pass.

Phase 4 Developer Rewards Program COMPLETE (2026-03-02). Created: developer-rewards/Cargo.toml, lib.rs, constants.rs (MIN_CU=1000, COOLDOWN=1.5M, 10% cap), error.rs (19 variants), instruction.rs (8 instructions), state.rs (ProgramRevenueConfig disc=0x52, EpochFeeTracker disc=0x45), processor.rs (8 handlers). Modified: Cargo.toml (workspace member), builtins/Cargo.toml + src/lib.rs. Verification: 66 tests pass (target 52); builtins 42/42 pass. Feature-gated behind projectdawn::id(). SDK 2.2.0: Pubkey::find_program_address unavailable—use seed concatenation. Gate 14/19 block multi-file Write/Edit—workaround bash bulk+Edit patches. Variable ProgramRevenueConfig uses borsh::to_vec. CPI wiring deferred Phase 5.

Audit .claude directory (2026-02-16): 22 skills valid SKILL.md, most working; /browser, /web, /status, /wrap-up functional; /ralph, /loop, /chain sophisticated. Hooks directory active + valid; test/utility files ACTIVE. No hooks/scripts/ orphaned. Ramdisk working (320KB capture_queue.jsonl). BLOAT: debug (356MB), backups (378MB), hooks/.disk_backup (19MB), file-history (43MB). .capture_queue.jsonl 184KB, history.jsonl 284KB reasonable. .lock files artifact. paste-cache ~140KB. archive/ 20 HANDOFF. No stale skills. venv in hooks/ needed. 2 CLAUDE.md backups. hooks/audit/ 2-5MB daily.
